name: Orlandi Valuta
description_short: Orlandi Valuta operates as a Western Union agent network offering money transfers, check cashing, and bill payment services across multiple U.S. locations.
description_long:
Orlandi Valuta appears to be a money services business operating under the Western Union brand and network. The company maintains a location finder website that directs consumers to Western Union agent locations, primarily concentrated in Colorado and New Mexico based on available data. The website infrastructure (locations.orlandivaluta.com) suggests Orlandi Valuta functions as a Western Union partner or franchisee rather than an independent operator.

The company offers core financial services typical of Western Union agents: money transfers (send and receive), check cashing through partner locations like Best Checks Cashed, cash pickup services, bill payment functionality, and Western Union Rewards program access. The service menu also includes mobile top-up, inmate payment options, prepaid card services, and the ability to receive money on a card. Multiple language support (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) indicates service to diverse immigrant and international communities.

Orlandi Valuta distinguishes itself primarily through its agent network model, partnering with established local businesses including check-cashing specialists, Latin-focused stores, and gift shops. This strategy places services in convenient neighborhood locations rather than dedicated storefronts. The multilingual platform and focus on serving communities in Colorado and New Mexico suggests targeting Latino and immigrant populations who rely on international money transfer and alternative financial services.

A significant limitation is the lack of company-specific information or transparency. The website is purely a Western Union location finder with no independent company branding, history, contact details, or service terms. Consumers interact with Western Union's systems and individual agent locations rather than Orlandi Valuta directly. Pricing, fees, and service hours vary by location and Western Union's terms. The limited location data available makes comprehensive service assessment difficult.
address: El Alamo Checks Cashed, 4401 4th St NW, Albuquerque, NM 87107

company_info.headquarters: El Alamo Checks Cashed, 4401 4th St NW, Albuquerque, NM 87107

pros: Multiple language support including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese for diverse customer base
Wide geographic network of agent locations across Colorado and New Mexico in accessible neighborhood businesses
Integrated Western Union services including money transfers, bill payment, and mobile top-up through single platform
Multilingual customer support and services specifically designed for immigrant and international money transfer needs
Western Union Rewards program integration for eligible transactions
Extended service hours at many locations with early morning opening times (8:00 AM typical)
Ability to receive money on cards and access prepaid card services through Western Union network
cons: No independent company transparency—website is purely a Western Union location finder with minimal Orlandi Valuta branding or information
Limited location availability in provided data—only 7 locations visible in search results across Colorado and New Mexico
Check cashing services depend entirely on third-party partner locations (Best Checks Cashed, independent stores) with no company control over quality or fees
Lack of published fee schedules, terms of service, or company contact information on the website
No direct customer service contact for Orlandi Valuta; disputes or issues must be resolved through Western Union or individual agent locations
best_for: Immigrants and international workers sending money to family abroad through Western Union network
Spanish-speaking and multilingual consumers needing financial services in their preferred language
People in Colorado and New Mexico seeking convenient neighborhood-based check cashing and money transfer services
Individuals without traditional bank accounts relying on alternative financial services for bill payment and cash transfers
diagnosis: Orlandi Valuta is best for Spanish-speaking consumers and immigrants in Colorado and New Mexico who need Western Union money transfer services, check cashing, and bill payment through conveniently located neighborhood agents. The primary caveat is that Orlandi Valuta operates as a Western Union agent network with minimal independent company identity or transparency—customers are essentially using Western Union services at various partner locations, with fees, hours, and quality varying by agent. Direct company accountability or support is not evident from the website.
services: Money transfers via Western Union (send and receive globally)
Cash pickup from Western Union agents
